name: claudecode-vertex-proxy
desc: Proxy service for Claude Code to access Claude models via GCP Vertex AI | 让 Claude Code 通过 GCP Vertex AI 访问 Claude 模型

name: DeepV-Ki
desc: DeepV-Ki — Instantly turn your code repository into a beautiful, interactive Wiki. An AI-powered documentation generator with RAG-based code Q&A, automatic architecture diagram generation, and multi-model support.

name: DeepVCode
desc: DeepV Code - A highly customizable AI coding assistant compatible with all major AI models. The perfect alternative to Claude Code and Codex, offering deep code analysis, intelligent suggestions, version rollback, multi-device sync, and automated testing across multiple languages and platforms.

name: OrionStar-Yi-34B-Chat
desc: OrionStar-Yi-34B-Chat 是一款开源中英文Chat模型，由猎户星空基于Yi-34B开源模型、使用15W+高质量语料微调而成。

name: Orion
desc: Orion-14B is a family of models includes a 14B foundation LLM, and a series of models: a chat model, a long context model, a quantized model, a RAG fine-tuned model, and an Agent fine-tuned model. Orion-14B 系列模型包括一个具有140亿参数的多语言基座大模型以及一系列相关的衍生模型，包括对话模型，长文本模型，量化模型，RAG微调模型，Agent微调模型等。

name: DeepVCode-Server-mini
desc: DeepV Code Server - A unified AI proxy that bridges multiple LLM providers (Vertex AI, OpenRouter) with a standardized API interface, designed for the DeepV Code Client ecosystem.

name: orionstar-rob-dev-claw
desc: 猎户星空二开应用龙虾技能

name: AgentOS2-Live
desc: AgentOS2-Live by OrionStar — an end-to-end real-time voice interaction solution based on the Realtime API. No more ASR/LLM/TTS pipeline: direct “voice in → voice out + function call.” Works seamlessly with DeepV Code for speech-driven robot applications.

name: end2end_sample
desc: A demo of AgentOS2-Live showing end-to-end voice control of an OrionStar robot and extensible scene applications.

name: vllm_server
desc: Quick start of local vLLM inference service

name: Orion-MoE
desc: Orion-MoE8x7B is a large language model with a sparse MoE architecture, trained from scratch on a multilingual corpus of about 5 trillion tokens, including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and more.  Orion-MoE8x7B是一个具有8乘以70亿参数的生成式稀疏混合专家大语言模型，该模型在训练数据语言上涵盖了中文、英语、日语、韩语等多种语言。在主流的公开基准评测中表现优异。
